cautions: General cleanup changed more than 24 cards; that feels aggressive for a cleanup pass.
warnings: List has 58 cards after validation; target is 60 for Modern.
results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.8.
results.why: This pass fills the list back to 60 cards while sharpening a focused Modern burn plan. [[Goblin Guide]] adds fast pressure, [[Searing Blaze]] improves tempo by pairing damage with creature removal, and the fetch lands make landfall more reliable for [[Searing Blaze]]. Cutting excess [[Mountain]]s keeps the mana base lean while upgrading overall card quality.

4 Skewer the Critics

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.8.
raw.plan: This pass fills the list back to 60 cards while sharpening a focused Modern burn plan. [[Goblin Guide]] adds fast pressure, [[Searing Blaze]] improves tempo by pairing damage with creature removal, and the fetch lands make landfall more reliable for [[Searing Blaze]]. Cutting excess [[Mountain]]s keeps the mana base lean while upgrading overall card quality.
raw.why: This pass fills the list back to 60 cards while sharpening a focused Modern burn plan. [[Goblin Guide]] adds fast pressure, [[Searing Blaze]] improves tempo by pairing damage with creature removal, and the fetch lands make landfall more reliable for [[Searing Blaze]]. Cutting excess [[Mountain]]s keeps the mana base lean while upgrading overall card quality.

added.goblin guide: [[Goblin Guide]] gives the deck a premier one-drop that starts damage immediately.
added.searing blaze: [[Searing Blaze]] adds efficient reach while also clearing blockers.
added.arid mesa: [[Arid Mesa]] improves landfall consistency for [[Searing Blaze]] and upgrades the mana base.
added.wooded foothills: [[Wooded Foothills]] adds more fetch access to trigger landfall and smooth draws.

removed.mountain: [[Mountain]] was trimmed to make room for stronger spells and fetch lands.

warnings: List has 58 cards after validation; target is 60 for Modern.
